title: Open Data Portal Catalogue - data package entity relation diagram - Open Government Portal
content:
## Open Data Portal Catalogue - data package entity relation diagram
Displays the title and format for each resource in Data Package in the form of a ERD Diagram. The Data Package resource offers a text based version.
